summary: Validate Data Integrity After ETL Process
description: This test case validates that data import/export, HL7/FHIR transformations, and integrity are maintained after the ETL process.
objective: To ensure that data is accurately transformed and imported/exported without any loss of integrity.
prerequisites: The system must be in a stable state with all necessary configurations set.
A sample dataset must be available for testing.
test_steps: Step 1: Prepare test data by importing a sample dataset into the system.
Step 2: Perform HL7/FHIR transformations on the imported data to verify accuracy and integrity.
Step 3: Export the transformed data from the system and compare it with the original dataset for any discrepancies.
expected_result: The exported data must match the original dataset, indicating that data integrity is maintained throughout the ETL process.
acceptance_criteria: Data import/export must be successful without any errors.
HL7/FHIR transformations must produce accurate and consistent results.
Exported data must match the original dataset with no discrepancies.
